---
title: "How to build a Quarto website"
author: "Martin Laptev"
date: "2026-03-22"
categories: [news]
---

With recent advances in artificial intelligence, web development is no longer solely the domain of highly trained engineers.

For over a decade, I have been encouraging everyone to create their own website as an introduction to software engineering in general and web development in particular.

The tools I used to create websites have improved greatly over time and I would port my personal website to a new system every few years.

 to advise focusing on overall patterns instead of with that focusing on the fundamentals.

Anyone can now create code. and quite often we rely on the software that others have written. Computer programming code starts in text files. The obvious answer is the first post in a Quarto blog. Welcome!

![](thumbnail.jpg)

Since this post doesn't specify an explicit `image`, the first image in the post will be used in the listing page of posts.
